ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Starting price of the product */,
  "design" TEXT /* Design specifications of the product */,
  "frequency_response" TEXT /* On-axis frequency response of the product */,
  "low_frequency_extension" TEXT /* Low frequency extension of the product */,
  "sensitivity" TEXT /* Sensitivity rating of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the product belongs */,
  "driver_size" TEXT /* Size of the driver in the product */,
  "rms_power" TEXT /* RMS power of the product in watts */,
  "dynamic_peak_power" TEXT /* Dynamic peak power of the product in watts */,
  "sensitivity_rating" TEXT /* Sensitivity rating of the product in dB */,
  "impedance" TEXT /* Impedance of the product in ohms */,
  "connectivity_options" TEXT /* Connectivity options available for the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL to the product video */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period for the product in months */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the product was added to the catalog */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product associated with this inventory record */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Current quantity available in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Level at which new stock should be ordered */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory was last updated */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comments made by the user regarding the product */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "not_helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review not helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address where the order should be shipped */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order, e.g., pending, shipped, delivered */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment, e.g., credit card, PayPal */,
  "shipping_cost" TEXT /* Cost of shipping */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Amount of tax applied to the order */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the order including tax and shipping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being analyzed */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the product */,
  "sales" INTEGER /* Total number of sales for the product */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product from user reviews */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks on the product page */,
  "add_to_cart" INTEGER /* Number of times the product was added to the cart */,
  "abandonment_rate" REAL /* Rate at which the product was abandoned in the cart */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Rate at which the product was converted into a sale */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the analytics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
